# Suites that MUST appear when web_delegate.cpp changes.
# Source: PR !83647 web delegate changes, verified 2026-04
#
# web_delegate.cpp is the C++ bridge between the JS Web component and
# native rendering. Changes affect all Web-related test suites.
#
# NOTE: No matching ArkUI XTS test directory exists for web delegate.
# Web tests live under test/xts/acts/web/ with different naming conventions.
# This fixture validates that the selector abstains or returns very few results.
